theme_and_archetype.description: A highly authoritative, clean, and lightning-fast aesthetic modeled after top-tier fintech apps like CRED, Razorpay, and Stripe. Uses pure, high-contrast structural colors (Navy, White, Black) with a single aggressive kinetic accent (Electric Lime) to guide action. No gradients on white, no muddy purples. Precision is the priority.

headings.usage: Hero text, section titles, major numbers (wallet balance).

data_and_numbers.usage: Transaction IDs, timestamps, exact monetary values, bill items.

usage_rules.background_app: Pure White or Off-White to maximize receipt legibility.
usage_rules.background_marketing: Deep Navy with Electric Lime accents for a premium "pro" feel.
usage_rules.cta_buttons: Electric Lime with Pure Black text for maximum kinetic energy. No gradients.
usage_rules.text: Pure Black on White. Pure White on Navy.
usage_rules.borders: 1px solid border_gray for clean separations. No soft shadows on cards.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense but breathable. Utilize the screen fully for workflows.

scale.touch_targets: min-h-[48px] min-w-[48px] (CRITICAL for mobile fintech UX)

grid_system.dashboard: Mobile-first 1-column layout, expanding to 3-columns on desktop. Dense data presentation.

surfaces.cards: Flat, pure white background, 1px solid border (#E2E8F0), rounded-xl, NO shadow.
surfaces.modals: Bottom sheets on mobile (rounded-t-2xl), standard dialogs on desktop.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Only used for sticky headers: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 (light) or bg-navy_dark/80 (dark).

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4FF00] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#BCE300] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0A1128] text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#152042] transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0A1128] text-[#0A1128] font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3

inputs.style: h-12 border-b-2 border-gray-200 bg-transparent rounded-none focus:border-[#0A1128] focus:ring-0 transition-colors px-0 text-lg
inputs.note: Minimize typing. Use floating labels or clean placeholders.

icons.style: Sharp, 24x24 for standard, 32x32 for categories. Stroke width 2 or 1.5.

components.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., 'pay-now-btn', 'category-food-card', 'wallet-balance-display').

animations.transitions: Spring animations for all route changes and bottom sheets (Framer Motion).
animations.micro_interactions: Haptic-style scale down on button press (scale: 0.98).
animations.ai_scanning: A scanning laser effect (Electric Lime line moving over the image) with skeleton loaders for text detection.

marketing_landing.hero: Dark Navy background. Huge Outfit heading. 3D app mockup floating. Electric Lime primary CTA.
marketing_landing.features: Bento box layout on white background showing 'How it works' (Scan -> Pay -> Bill).
marketing_landing.testimonials: Marquee of user reviews with stark black-and-white avatars.
marketing_landing.footer: Massive typography for 'Get BILL4PE', stark black background, lime links.

app_splash.layout: Deep Navy full screen, BILL4PE logo in center, smooth fade to Dashboard/Categories.

app_dashboard_and_wallet.wallet_card: Dark Navy card, rounded-2xl, large JetBrains Mono text for balance, Lime 'Recharge' button.
app_dashboard_and_wallet.recent_bills: List layout. Left: Icon (Category), Middle: Merchant Name + Date, Right: Amount (JetBrains Mono).

workflow_1_categories.layout: Grid of 10 categories (Food, Travel, etc.). 2 columns on mobile. Minimalist icons. Tap triggers bottom sheet for sub-categories.

workflow_2_capture.layout: Full-screen camera view with overlay, or clean form for manual entry. Big circular shutter button.

workflow_3_ai_editor.layout: Image preview at top (collapsible). Editable line-items list below. Sticky bottom bar with 'Live Total' and 'Pay Now' (Electric Lime).

workflow_4_payment.layout: QR Scanner overlay. Auto-captures Merchant Card (Name, UPI, Txn ID, Geo, Time). Clean success checkmark animation.

workflow_5_bill_gen.modal: Bottom sheet confirming merchant details. Explicitly shows '-₹5 Fee from Wallet'. Swipe-to-confirm or large tap button to Generate.
workflow_5_bill_gen.pdf_preview: Clean, official-looking PDF layout using JetBrains Mono for tabular data. Download/Share floating action buttons.

images.description: Premium mobile-first fintech app mockup floating in 3D space with deep navy and lime accents. Use in the landing page hero section.
Abstract geometric deep navy background with glowing lime edges. Use for marketing sections behind content.
Flat lay of receipts and coffee. Use in 'How it works' or features section.
Google logo building exterior. Use as a placeholder for corporate trust/partner section on the landing page.
Coca Cola logo sign. Use as a placeholder for corporate trust/partner section on the landing page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark blue (#0A1128), pure white, pure black, and electric lime (#D4FF00) palette. NO purple. NO gradients on white.
Ensure all app routes (under /app) are mobile-first, utilizing bottom sheets, massive touch targets (min 48px), and strict 1-column layouts.
Build the landing page (/) as a desktop-premium layout with the deep navy background for the hero.
Use 'Outfit' for headings, 'Manrope' for body text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data/numbers.
All interactive elements must have semantic data-testid tags.
Implement Framer Motion for the AI scanning overlay (a moving lime laser over an image container) and route transitions.
